response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform expertise; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only brief C++ exposure in academic or minor roles, and no evidence of leading cloud compute platforms or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers as required.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Demonstrated ability to lead complex projects and build dev-ops infrastructure
concerns: No evidence of 8+ years of C++ programming as required
Lacks demonstrable experience with cloud compute platforms or distributed systems at scale
No record of technical leadership in cloud or DevOps engineering roles
